kinyarwanda.answer_your_first_challenge_correctly: Subiza neza imbogamizi yawe ya mbere
kinyarwanda.estimate_the_value_the_arrow_points_to: Gereranya agaciro akambi kerekeza (kugeza ku muto wuzuye wa hafi).
kinyarwanda.click_the_number_line_above_to_place_a: Kanda umurongo w'imibare wo hejuru ushyireho ikimenyetso.
kinyarwanda.number_line_marker_use_arrow_keys_to_m: Ikimenyetso cy'umurongo w'imibare. Koresha buto z'akambi kugira ngo wimuke, Home/End ku mpera, Shift ku ntambwe nini.
kinyarwanda.number_line_fractions_above_decimals_b: 📏 Umurongo w'imibare — ibice hejuru, ibikubo munsi
kinyarwanda.same_amount_three_more_visuals_quantit: 🔄 Ingano imwe, andi mashusho atatu. Ingano irabikwa muri buri shusho.
kinyarwanda.move_the_marker_by_a_fraction_fraction: ➕➖ Imura ikimenyetso ku gice — imibare y'ibice ku murongo
kinyarwanda.click_a_chip_below_the_marker_slides_a: Kanda agakarito ko hasi. Ikimenyetso kiranyerera; amashusho yose ane arahindurwa. Umurongo wiyongera wenyine niwarenga impera.
kinyarwanda.common_denominator_hunter_how_to_add_f: 🤝 Umuhigi w'Umubare Ushyira Hasi Usanzwe — uko wateranya ibice bifite imibare ishyira hasi itandukanye
kinyarwanda.you_cannot_add_1_2_1_3_directly_first_: Ntushobora guteranya 1/2 + 1/3 ako kanya. Banza ushake umubare ushyira hasi usanzwe (LCM irakora), wandike buri gice bushya, hanyuma uteranye imibare iri hejuru.
kinyarwanda.first_fraction_numerator: Umubare uri hejuru w'igice cya mbere
kinyarwanda.first_fraction_denominator: Umubare ushyira hasi w'igice cya mbere
kinyarwanda.second_fraction_numerator: Umubare uri hejuru w'igice cya kabiri
kinyarwanda.second_fraction_denominator: Umubare ushyira hasi w'igice cya kabiri
kinyarwanda.equivalent_fractions_same_point_many_n: ∞ Ibice bingana — ahantu hamwe, amazina menshi. Kanda kugira ngo wongere ugabanye umurongo.
kinyarwanda.multiply_or_divide_the_top_and_bottom_: Gwiza (cyangwa ugabanye) umubare uri hejuru N'uwo hasi ku mubare umwe → agaciro kamwe, izina ritandukanye. Ikimenyetso ntikinyeganyega.
kinyarwanda.a_quarter_is_0_25_1_4_of_a_dollar_a_di: Kimwe cya kane ni $0.25 = 1/4 cy'idolari. Dime ni $0.10 = 1/10. Ibiceri ni imyitozo y'ibikubo.
kinyarwanda.every_decimal_place_is_a_fraction_1st_: Buri mwanya w'igikubo ni igice. Umwanya wa 1: icumi, wa 2: ijana, wa 3: igihumbi.
kinyarwanda.reset_frac_dec_tab_to_defaults: Subiza ahabanza tab ya Igice Igikubo
kinyarwanda.why_fractions_and_decimals_are_the_sam: 💡 Impamvu ibice n'ibikubo ari kintu kimwe
kinyarwanda.3_4_means_3_divided_by_4_type_3_4_into: 3/4 bisobanura «3 bigabanyijwe na 4». Andika 3 ÷ 4 kuri kalkuleteri iyo ari yo yose: 0.75. Umurongo w'igice na ÷ bisobanura kimwe.
kinyarwanda.a_decimal_is_a_fraction_with_a_hidden_: Igikubo NI igice gifite umubare ushyira hasi uhishe.
kinyarwanda.the_point_at_1_4_is_the_same_point_as_: Ahantu kuri 1/4 ni ho hamwe na 0.25. Ahantu hamwe, amazina abiri.
kinyarwanda.1_2_0_5_stops_1_4_0_25_stops_1_3_0_333: 1/2 = 0.5 (birahagarara). 1/4 = 0.25 (birahagarara). 1/3 = 0.333… (bisubiramo iteka). Umubare ushyira hasi niwo ufata icyemezo: nigabanijwemo gusa na 2 na 5, birarangira. Bitabaye ibyo birasubiramo. Reba ikimenyetso ↻ ku ikarita y'igikubo.
kinyarwanda.explore_the_visual_home_for_number_sen: Shakisha — urugo rw'amashusho ku kumva imibare
kinyarwanda.numbers_as_positions_on_a_line_not_jus: Imibare nk'imyanya ku murongo, atari ibimenyetso gusa. Imibare mibi yigaragaza hafi ya zeru. Ibice biri HAGATI y'imibare yuzuye; ibikubo ni igitekerezo kimwe gisobanutse neza. Common Core 2.MD.6, 3.NF.2, 6.NS.6.
kinyarwanda.where_does_7_8_sit_what_about_2_4_esti: 7/8 iri he? Naho −2.4? Kugereranya bubaka kumva ubunini. Ubushakashatsi (Siegler 2009) bwerekana ko ukuri ku murongo w'imibare guhanura intsinzi y'imibare izaza neza kurusha ibyukuri byafashwe mu mutwe.
kinyarwanda.skip_count_the_bridge_to_multiplicatio: Kubara Usimbuka — ikiraro kijya ku kuba
kinyarwanda.2_4_6_8_the_2_times_table_walking_skip: 2, 4, 6, 8… = imbonerahamwe yo kuba ya 2 igenda. Kubara ku 5 na 10 bitegura amafaranga n'igihe. Kubara usubira inyuma ku 3 bitegura gukuramo no kugabanya. Umurongo werekana injyana.
kinyarwanda.fractions_decimals_same_point_two_name: Igice ↔ Igikubo, ahantu hamwe, amazina abiri
kinyarwanda.a_fraction_is_a_division_problem_a_dec: Igice ni ikibazo cyo kugabanya. Igikubo ni igice gifite umubare ushyira hasi uhishe 10, 100, 1000… 1/4 na 0.25 ni ahantu HAMWE ku murongo. Common Core 4.NF.6, 4.NF.7, 5.NBT.3.
kinyarwanda.two_fractions_four_possible_relationsh: Ibice bibiri, isano enye zishoboka: bingana, bikora ku kimenyetso ½, A gito cyangwa B gito. Kurura slidars, andika icyo ubona, kandi wandike itegeko ryawe ryo kugereranya.
kinyarwanda.adjust_the_numerators_and_denominators: Hindura imibare iri hejuru n'ishyira hasi y'ibice bibiri. Widget ikubwira imwe mu isano enye zitandukanye. Nta manota, nta kugaragaza — kurura gusa hanyuma witegereze.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_free_text_when_do_two_fract: Igitekerezo (inyandiko yigenga): Ni ryari ibice bibiri bingana? Ni ryari kimwe kiri hafi ya ½?
kinyarwanda.find_two_fractions_with_different_nume: Shaka ibice bibiri bifite imibare iri hejuru n'ishyira hasi itandukanye ariko bingana.
kinyarwanda.what_makes_a_fraction_close_to_what_ab: Ni iki gituma igice kiba hafi ya ½? Naho hafi ya 1?
kinyarwanda.when_are_two_fractions_easy_to_compare: Ni ryari ibice bibiri byoroshye kugereranya? Ni ryari bigoye?
kinyarwanda.explain_how_to_compare_two_fractions_w: Sobanura uko wagereranya ibice bibiri utabihinduye igikubo.
kinyarwanda.design_note_discrete_4_state_outcome_n: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: igisubizo gitandukanye cy'imimerere 4; nta manota yo kugereranya ibice; nta kugaragaza — ku bushake.
kinyarwanda.1_4_tabs_n_new_challenge_ai_tutor_on_m: ⌨️ 1-4: tab | N: imbogamizi nshya | ?: umwarimu wa AI | ← → ku kimenyetso: imura | Home/End: impera
kinyarwanda.integers_absolute_value_distance_from_: 🔢 Imibare yuzuye — Agaciro nyako = intera uvuye kuri zeru
kinyarwanda.absolute_value_number_line_showing_dis: Umurongo w'imibare w'agaciro nyako werekana intera uvuye kuri zeru
